# stat-api Go SDK

Official Go client for the [stat-api](https://stat-api.com) sports data API — a
single, typed surface over NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, and PGA data.

Zero dependencies beyond the standard library. Go 1.23+.

## Install

```sh
go get github.com/stat-api/stat-api/go@latest
```

## Authenticate

The client reads your API key from the `STAT_API_KEY` environment
variable, or you can pass it directly:

```go
client, err := statapi.New()                                        // reads STAT_API_KEY
client, err := statapi.NewWithOptions(statapi.Options{APIKey: "sdb_..."}) // or pass it in
```

Point at a different host with `Options.BaseURL` or `STAT_API_BASE_URL`
(default `https://api.stat-api.com`).

## List, get, and iterate

```go
ctx := context.Background()

// One page (the list envelope).
page, err := client.NBA.Players.List(ctx, &statapi.NBAPlayersListParams{
	Limit: statapi.Int(25),
})
for _, player := range page.Rows {
	fmt.Println(player.FullName)
}

// One row by id.
player, err := client.NBA.Players.Get(ctx, 201939)

// Auto-paginate the whole result set (walks next_from_id for you).
for player, err := range client.NBA.Players.All(ctx, &statapi.NBAPlayersListParams{TeamID: statapi.Int(1)}) {
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	fmt.Println(player.FullName)
}
```

High-precision columns (dates, timestamps, decimals) arrive as strings so no
precision is lost on the wire; nullable columns are pointers.

## Errors

Every non-2xx response returns a typed error wrapping `*statapi.APIError`, so
`errors.As` recovers either the specific type or the base:

```go
page, err := client.NBA.Players.List(ctx, nil)
if err != nil {
	var quotaErr *statapi.QuotaExceededError
	var apiErr *statapi.APIError
	switch {
	case errors.As(err, &quotaErr):
		fmt.Println("quota resets at", quotaErr.ResetsAt, "→", quotaErr.UpgradeURL)
	case errors.As(err, &apiErr):
		fmt.Println(apiErr.Status, apiErr.Body)
	}
}
```

| Status | Error |
|--------|-------|
| 400 | `ValidationError` |
| 401 | `AuthenticationError` |
| 402 | `PlanRequiredError` |
| 404 | `NotFoundError` |
| 429 | `QuotaExceededError` |
| other | `APIError` |

GET requests retry transient network failures and 5xx responses twice; 4xx
(including 429) never retry.

## Quota

Every list `Page` carries the monthly record quota parsed from the
`X-Quota-*` response headers:

```go
page, _ := client.NBA.Players.List(ctx, &statapi.NBAPlayersListParams{Limit: statapi.Int(1)})
if page.Quota.Present {
	fmt.Println(page.Quota.Remaining, "of", page.Quota.Limit, "records left")
}
```
